  "action_vector": {
      "funding_boost": 1.0,
      "teacher_incentive": 0.8,
      "student_scholarship": 0.5,
      "attendance_mandate": 0.2,
      "resource_realloc": 0.6,

   "reasoning": "A blanket funding boost will inject much-needed cash into the system, and a strong teacher incentive will help keep our existing staff on board. I'd take a cautious approach to student scholarships, as we don't want to inadvertently create more stress. An attendance mandate will just add to the workload without addressing the deeper issues. Resource reallocation will help with efficiency, but I'm not sure what to cut yet. Transparency is crucial, but let's not get too caught up in optics. We need to hire some new staff, but not a full-on hiring spree – that's just a recipe for disaster. Counseling programs are a no-brainier, though.",
   "confidence": 0.85
}
